languages.text: {n}Иждриг сплевывает на землю кровавый сгусток и оскаливает зубы. Теперь вы понимаете, почему он с такой легкостью сопротивлялся крикам Погонщицы. Вой зверя в его голове гораздо громче. С ревом он кидается к вам, заключая в медвежьи объятья. Нож выпадает из вашей руки, со звоном прокатываясь по полу.{/n}

{n}Izdrig spits blood and snarls. Now you understand why he resisted the Drover's screams with such ease: the howl of the beast in his mind is far louder. With a roar, he lunges at you, locking you in a crushing embrace. The knife slips from your hand, clattering across the floor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Иждриг сплевывает на землю кровавый сгусток и оскаливает зубы. Теперь вы понимаете, почему он с такой легкостью сопротивлялся крикам Погонщицы. Вой зверя в его голове гораздо громче. С ревом он кидается к вам, заключая в медвежьи объятья. Нож выпадает из вашей руки, со звоном прокатываясь по полу.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig spits blood and snarls. Now you understand why he resisted the Drover's screams with such ease. The beast's howl in his head is far louder. With a roar, he lunges at you, locking you in a crushing embrace. The knife slips from your hand, clattering across the floor.{/n}

{n}Izdrig spits blood and snarls. Now you understand why he resisted the Drover's screams with such ease: the howl of the beast in his mind is far louder. With a roar, he lunges at you, locking you in a crushing embrace. The knife slips from your hand, clattering across the floor.{/n}
{n}After a few more moments, you and Batoshski tumble to the ground, trying to overpower each other and get to one of the knives.{/n}

{n}Izdrig spits blood and snarls. Now you understand why he resisted the Drover's screams with such ease. The beast's howl in his head is far louder. With a roar, he lunges at you, locking you in a crushing embrace. The knife slips from your hand, clattering across the floor.{/n}

{n}Izdrig spits blood and snarls. Now you understand why he resisted the Drover's screams with such ease: the howl of the beast in his mind is far louder. With a roar, he lunges at you, locking you in a crushing embrace. The knife slips from your hand, clattering across the floor.{/n}

{n}Izdrig spits blood and snarls. Now you understand why he resisted the Drover's screams with such ease: the howl of the beast in his mind is far louder. With a roar, he lunges at you, locking you in a crushing embrace. The knife slips from your hand, clattering across the floor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}数秒後、あなたはバトシュスキーと地面に転がり、互いの上になり、ナイフの1本を手に入れようとする。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}After a few more moments, you and Batoshski tumble to the ground, trying to overpower each other and get to one of the knives.{/n}

traits.locale_text: 数秒後、あなたはバトシュスキーと地面に転がり、互いの上になり、ナイフの1本を手に入れようとする。

languages.text: {n}Izdrig crache du sang, puis sourit. Vous comprenez à présent comment il a pu résister si facilement aux cris du Chasseur : sa propre bête intérieure gronde bien plus fort encore. Il se jette sur vous en poussant un cri tonitruant et vous entrave par une étreinte brutale. Le couteau vole de votre main et tombe par terre.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig spits blood and snarls. Now you understand why he resisted the Drover's screams with such ease: the howl of the beast in his mind is far louder. With a roar, he lunges at you, locking you in a crushing embrace. The knife slips from your hand, clattering across the floor.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig crache du sang, puis sourit. Vous comprenez à présent comment il a pu résister si facilement aux cris du Chasseur : sa propre bête intérieure gronde bien plus fort encore. Il se jette sur vous en poussant un cri tonitruant et vous entrave par une étreinte brutale. Le couteau vole de votre main et tombe par terre.{/n}

languages.text: {n}İzdrig kan tükürüp hırlıyor. Şimdi Çoban'ın çığlıklarına neden bu kadar kolay direndiğini anlıyorsun: Zihnindeki hayvan, çok daha gürültülü uluyor. Kükreyerek sana doğru atılıyor ve ezici bir kucaklamayla seni hapsediyor. Bıçak elinden kayıp gidiyor, zemine çarparak takırdıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig spits blood and snarls. Now you understand why he resisted the Drover's screams with such ease: the howl of the beast in his mind is far louder. With a roar, he lunges at you, locking you in a crushing embrace. The knife slips from your hand, clattering across the floor.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}İzdrig kan tükürüp hırlıyor. Şimdi Çoban'ın çığlıklarına neden bu kadar kolay direndiğini anlıyorsun: Zihnindeki hayvan, çok daha gürültülü uluyor. Kükreyerek sana doğru atılıyor ve ezici bir kucaklamayla seni hapsediyor. Bıçak elinden kayıp gidiyor, zemine çarparak takırdıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Izdrig spuckt knurrend Blut. Jetzt verstehst du, warum er den Schreien des Treibers mühelos widerstehen konnte. Das Heulen der Bestie in seinem Verstand ist deutlich lauter. Mit lautem Gebrüll stürzt er sich auf dich und nimmt dich in den Schwitzkasten. Das Messer gleitet dir aus der Hand und fällt klappernd auf den Boden.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig spits blood and snarls. Now you understand why he resisted the Drover's screams with such ease: the howl of the beast in his mind is far louder. With a roar, he lunges at you, locking you in a crushing embrace. The knife slips from your hand, clattering across the floor.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Izdrig spuckt knurrend Blut. Jetzt verstehst du, warum er den Schreien des Treibers mühelos widerstehen konnte. Das Heulen der Bestie in seinem Verstand ist deutlich lauter. Mit lautem Gebrüll stürzt er sich auf dich und nimmt dich in den Schwitzkasten. Das Messer gleitet dir aus der Hand und fällt klappernd auf den Boden.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Izdrig escupe sangre y gruñe. Ahora entiendes por qué resiste los gritos del Pastor con tanta facilidad: los de su bestia interior son mucho más fuertes. Con un rugido, se abalanza sobre ti y te atrapa en un abrazo asfixiante. El cuchillo cae de tu mano y repiquetea contra el suelo.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig spits blood and snarls. Now you understand why he resisted the Drover's screams with such ease: the howl of the beast in his mind is far louder. With a roar, he lunges at you, locking you in a crushing embrace. The knife slips from your hand, clattering across the floor.{/n}

Con un rugido, se abalanza sobre ti y te atrapa en un abrazo asfixiante. El cuchillo cae de tu mano y repiquetea contra el suelo.{/n}

languages.text: {n}伊兹德里格吐出一口血，发出咆哮。现在你明白为什么他能轻松抵抗拒生花的尖啸了，因为他脑海中那头野兽的咆哮声要响亮得多。他大吼一声，朝你猛扑过来，把你死死箍在怀中，几乎要将你压碎。你手中的刀滑落，哐啷一声掉在地上。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Izdrig spits blood and snarls. Now you understand why he resisted the Drover's screams with such ease: the howl of the beast in his mind is far louder. With a roar, he lunges at you, locking you in a crushing embrace. The knife slips from your hand, clattering across the floor.{/n}
